articles.title: Cumulative seizures of potential poll inducements in West Bengal, Tamil Nadu touches Rs 1,072 crore
articles.description: Of the total 127.7-crore cash seizures, over 100 crore crore were in Tamil Nadu and Rs 27.5 crore in West Bengal. Around 39.3 lakh litres of liquor valued at Rs 102.5 crore was seized in West Bengal, as against 1.2 lakh litres worth Rs 3.8 crore in Tamil Nadu. The value of seizewd freebies was higher in Tamil Nadu at Rs 259 crore, as against Rs 178.8 crore in West Bengal.

Relationships will experience a shift towards clarity and honesty, while health requires attention to subtle signs and a focus on balance. articles.title: Cash, Liquor, Drugs: EC Seizures Cross Rs 1,000 Crore In Poll-Bound Tamil Nadu And West Bengal
articles.description: The Election Commission of India reported that poll-related seizures in West Bengal and Tamil Nadu have exceeded Rs 1,000 crore during ongoing assembly elections and bypolls. According to the Commission, enforcement agencies have seized inducements worth Rs 1,072.13 crore, including cash, liquor, drugs, precious metals and other freebies allegedly intended to influence voters. Tamil Nadu recorded higher seizures at Rs 599.24 crore, while West Bengal accounted for Rs 472.89 crore. The Commission said extensive monitoring systems have been put in place, including thousands of flying squads and static surveillance teams to ensure compliance with the Model Code of Conduct. It also stressed that citizens and political parties should report violations through the C-Vigil platform to support fair and transparent elections.

articles.description: Dubai Metro Gold Line project approved: The new metro line will span 42 km and feature 18 stations, marking Dubai's first fully underground metro corridor.

articles.title: ‘I am here to testify on budget’: Lutnick dodges Van Hollen’s question on ties with Jeffrey Epstein
articles.description: Howard Lutnick faces explosive Senate questioning over alleged ties to Jeffrey Epstein, as lawmakers accuse him of misleading Americans and dodging key questions. The high-stakes hearing saw tense exchanges, with Lutnick deflecting scrutiny by focusing on the budget instead of addressing Epstein links. The controversy comes amid newly released Epstein files fueling bipartisan outrage and demands for accountability.

Students can access their scorecards using registration details and download the result PDF for future reference. In case of discrepancies, they must contact the university’s exam cell and stay updated on revaluation notifications.

articles.title: From US To Israel: Global Leaders Mark One Year Of Pahalgam Terror Attack
articles.description: On the first anniversary of the Pahalgam terror attack, US Ambassador to India Sergio Gor and Israeli Ambassador Reuven Azar paid tribute to the 26 victims and expressed solidarity with India. Gor reaffirmed Washington’s support in the fight against terrorism and extended condolences to the affected families. Azar also remembered the victims in a post on social media, stressing that terrorism has no borders and highlighting Israel’s continued support for India. The remembrance marks a moment of shared grief and global unity against terror following the 2025 attack in Jammu and Kashmir.

articles.title: Beijing denies Trump’s ‘gift’ claim over seized ship bound for Iran

articles.title: UAE To Get U.S. Loan? Trump Assures Full Help To Gulf Ally Hit Hardest By Iranian Strikes
articles.description: Even the wealthiest nations have a breaking point. After enduring over 1,400 missile and drone strikes, the UAE’s economy is feeling the heat. Markets are shaken, and the once-impenetrable image of Dubai as a global safe haven is under threat. Now, President Donald Trump is stepping in with a "Big Brother" offer, suggesting the U.S. is ready to provide financial support and currency swaps to keep the dirham stable. articles.title: Inside Olivia Culpo’s modern motherhood playbook as she quietly supports Hailee Steinfeld’s life-changing new chapter
articles.description: Olivia Culpo’s brief but meaningful social media interactions with Hailee Steinfeld reveal a deeper shift in how NFL partners support each other. Rather than competing for attention, Culpo’s understated encouragement highlights a growing culture of solidarity. As Steinfeld adjusts to motherhood after welcoming her child with Josh Allen, Culpo’s quiet presence reflects shared experience and mutual respect. The moment underscores how modern NFL spouses are redefining visibility, balancing personal identity with partnership, and creating space for support in a highly public world.

articles.title: Not in Switzerland. This train trip in summers named world’s most scenic journey - Cherry blossoms, lush forests, majestic mountains
articles.description: Japan's Sagano Romantic Train is named the world's most scenic journey. This sightseeing express runs between Saga Torokko Station and Kameoka Torokko Station. The 7 km ride takes 25 minutes. Passengers experience changing landscapes throughout the year. Spring brings cherry blossoms, summer offers lush greenery. Autumn displays vibrant maple leaves. Winter presents a snow-covered scene.
